raise_heat_press_handle.query: a worker lifts the orange handle of the heat press and opens it

remove_white_fabric_from_heat_press.query: a worker pulls a white fabric item out from under the open heat press

separate_white_fabric_from_stack.query: a worker separates one white fabric item from the stack on the left and lifts it

align_and_fold_white_fabric_on_table.query: a worker folds a white fabric item on the table with both hands
